title: Smoky Sevaiiya Canadian Pancake
description: A twist on traditional pancakes with the smoky crunch of Canadian bacon and Sevaiiya for a unique flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, cinnamon, and milk.
Add the soaked Sevaiiya and Canadian Bacon to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of oil.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with a drizzle of Smoky Maple Syrup and a sprinkle of Crunchy Granola.
Optional: Add a side of Agemono for added crunch.
